h1.visual_description: Inferred from document footer: Bold, sans-serif, reddish-orange font used for the primary document title.
h1.example_text: Gender Analysis of Violent Extremism and the Impact of COVID-19 on Peace and Security in ASEAN

h2.visual_description: Bold, bright blue, sans-serif font used for figure titles and major section labels.
h2.example_text: Figure 7: Respondents' reaction to the statement...

visual_matchers.pattern: Italicized text blocks accompanied by a light blue vertical accent bar and large blue decorative quotation mark icons.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Direct interviewee quotes or qualitative testimony.

visual_matchers.pattern: Concentric radial charts with multi-colored segments and percentage call-out labels connected by thin grey lines.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Narrative attribution (e.g., 'One interviewee from Indonesia noted that:')

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer contains a horizontal blue/red line, the full document title in reddish-orange, and a page number at the bottom right.
